title: HOUSING RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: COMMUNITY IN ACTION HOUSING RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on the home buying and owning processes. Classes available for pre-purchase, post-purchase, financial literacy, and Ready to Rent. 915 SW 3rd Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 889-9555 136 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-9555 ext 136 Thomas Huffman [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Harney and Malheur Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the base of St. Alphonsus Medical Center, across from the Lion's Park, and across the parking lot from the Ontario Chamber of Commerce building. Services: Financial Literacy Training Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOUSING/SHELTER - READY TO RENT HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RESIDENTIAL REHABILITATION REVOLVING LOAN AND GRANT PROGRAMS HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY IN ACTION
